pokemon:shiinotic.name: Shiinotic
pokemon:shiinotic.summary: It emits flickering spores that cause drowsiness. When its prey succumb to sleep, this Pokémon feeds on them by sucking in their energy.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It emits flickering spores that cause drowsiness. When its prey succumb to sleep, this Pokémon feeds on them by sucking in their energy.
If you see a light deep in a forest at night, don’t go near. Shiinotic will make you fall fast asleep.
Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again.
Its flickering spores lure in prey and put them to sleep. Once this Pokémon has its prey snoozing, it drains their vitality with its fingertips.
When it starts fighting for territory with Parasect, the entire area gets completely coated in spores!
It puts its prey to sleep and siphons off their vitality through the tip of its arms. If one of its kind is weakened, it helps by sending it vitality.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It emits flickering spores that cause drowsiness. When its prey succumb to sleep, this Pokémon feeds on them by sucking in their energy.

pokemon:morelull.name: Morelull
pokemon:morelull.summary: As it drowses the day away, it nourishes itself by sucking from tree roots. It wakens at the fall of night, wandering off in search of a new tree.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As it drowses the day away, it nourishes itself by sucking from tree roots. It wakens at the fall of night, wandering off in search of a new tree.
Morelull live in forests that stay dark even during the day. They scatter flickering spores that put enemies to sleep.
It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.
Pokémon living in the forest eat the delicious caps on Morelull’s head. The caps regrow overnight.
It likes damp dark places. When night falls, the spores filling the caps of its mushrooms glow.
It scatters its shining spores around itself. Even though they’re dangerous, nighttime tours of forests where Morelull live are popular.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: As it drowses the day away, it nourishes itself by sucking from tree roots. It wakens at the fall of night, wandering off in search of a new tree.
